title: Civil Obligations
description: Covers duties arising from contracts, torts, and law.
key_articles_rules: Article 147: Obligation arises from contract or law.
Article 148: Damages must compensate actual loss.

title: Property Law
description: Governs ownership, transfer, and use of property.
key_articles_rules: Article 90: Ownership is protected by law.
Article 92: Transfer requires registration.

title: Contract Law
description: Covers formation, validity, and execution of contracts.
key_articles_rules: Article 120: Contracts require consent of both parties.
Article 125: Contracts violating law are void.

title: Tort Law
description: Covers civil wrongs causing harm to others.
examples_use_cases: Compensation for injury caused by negligence.
key_articles_rules: Article 180: Tortfeasor liable for damage.
Article 185: Joint liability applies in shared fault.

title: Personal Rights and Obligations
description: Covers rights of individuals in society.
examples_use_cases: Right to privacy and personal freedom.
key_articles_rules: Article 200: Personal rights are inviolable.
Article 205: Legal remedies available for infringement.

title: Succession Law
description: Rules for inheritance and property transfer after death.
key_articles_rules: Article 220: Legal heirs entitled to fixed shares.
Article 225: Testamentary freedom limited by law.

title: Civil Procedures
description: Rules for filing and pursuing civil lawsuits.
key_articles_rules: Article 250: Plaintiffs must follow prescribed procedures.
Article 255: Evidence must comply with legal standards.

title: Freedom of Expression
description: Guarantees the right to speak, write, and publish freely, subject to legal limits.
examples_use_cases: Online blogs and social media posts.
key_articles_rules: Article 19: Freedom of expression is protected.
Article 22: Limits exist for hate speech, incitement, and defamation.
notes_exceptions: National security laws may restrict expression.

title: Right to Equality
description: Prohibits discrimination based on race, religion, gender, disability, or social status.
examples_use_cases: Access to education and public services.
key_articles_rules: Article 3: Citizens are equal before the law.
Article 10: Discrimination in government services is prohibited.
notes_exceptions: Positive discrimination policies for marginalized groups are allowed.

title: Right to Privacy
description: Protects personal data, private life, and communications.
examples_use_cases: Data collection by companies or government.
key_articles_rules: Article 21: Collection and processing of personal data must be lawful.
Article 25: Violations carry civil and criminal penalties.
notes_exceptions: Government may collect data for security purposes with court authorization.

title: Freedom of Assembly
description: Right to peaceful protest, gathering, and association.
key_articles_rules: Article 30: Peaceful assembly is permitted.
Article 32: Prior notification may be required.
notes_exceptions: Public order, safety, and national security can impose limits.

title: Right to Access Justice
description: Guarantees access to courts and legal remedies.
key_articles_rules: Article 35: Legal assistance must be available to all.
Article 38: Courts must provide fair and timely hearings.

title: Anti-Discrimination Laws
description: Protects vulnerable groups against discrimination in all sectors.
examples_use_cases: Discrimination based on disability in employment.
key_articles_rules: Article 40: Discriminatory practices are punishable.

title: Protection of Vulnerable Groups
description: Special provisions for children, elderly, and persons with disabilities.
key_articles_rules: Article 45: Rights of vulnerable groups must be safeguarded.

title: Commercial Contracts
description: Governs contracts in trade, business transactions, and commercial agreements.
key_articles_rules: Article 50: Contracts must respect public policy and consent.
Article 55: Breach of contract allows claims for damages.
notes_exceptions: International trade contracts may follow separate rules.

title: Bankruptcy Law
description: Regulations for insolvency, liquidation, and creditor protection.
key_articles_rules: Article 70: Court supervises bankruptcy proceedings.
Article 75: Priority of creditor claims determined by law.
notes_exceptions: Small businesses may follow simplified procedures.

title: Trade Practices
description: Regulates fair trade, competition, and commercial fraud.
key_articles_rules: Article 80: Unfair competition is prohibited.
Article 85: Misleading commercial practices carry penalties.

title: Business Licensing
description: Rules for obtaining licenses for trade and commerce.
key_articles_rules: Article 90: Licenses must be obtained before operation.
Article 95: Non-compliance may result in fines or closure.

title: International Trade Regulations
description: Governs import/export, customs, and foreign trade contracts.
key_articles_rules: Article 100: Trade agreements take precedence over domestic law where applicable.
Article 105: Tariffs and duties must be paid according to law.

title: E-Commerce Law
description: Regulates online transactions, electronic contracts, and consumer protection.
key_articles_rules: Article 110: Electronic contracts are legally valid.
Article 115: E-commerce operators must provide transparent terms.

title: Agency and Representation
description: Legal rules for commercial agents, representatives, and franchises.
examples_use_cases: Rights and obligations of franchise holders.
key_articles_rules: Article 120: Agents act on behalf of principals.
Article 125: Liability for unauthorized acts rests with agent.

title: Company Formation
description: Rules for registering and operating companies in Egypt.
key_articles_rules: Article 5: Minimum capital depends on company type.
Article 10: Registration with Commercial Registry is required.
notes_exceptions: Small enterprises may follow simplified procedures.

title: Corporate Governance
description: Management rules, board responsibilities, and internal policies.
key_articles_rules: Article 20: Board must act in company’s best interest.
Article 25: Shareholder approval required for major decisions.

title: Shareholder Rights
description: Legal protection of shareholders’ investments and voting rights.
key_articles_rules: Article 30: Shareholders can inspect company records.
Article 35: Voting rights proportionate to shares owned.

title: Mergers and Acquisitions
description: Legal rules for combining or acquiring companies.
examples_use_cases: Acquiring shares in a joint-stock company.
key_articles_rules: Article 40: Requires board and shareholder approval.
Article 42: Notification to regulatory authorities is mandatory.

title: Corporate Finance Regulations
description: Rules for raising capital, issuing shares, and managing debt.
examples_use_cases: Borrowing from banks under corporate law.
key_articles_rules: Article 50: Companies must maintain proper accounting records.
Article 55: Dividends cannot exceed net profits.

title: Compliance and Reporting
description: Annual reporting, audits, and legal compliance obligations.
key_articles_rules: Article 60: Audited accounts must be submitted annually.
Article 65: Non-compliance may result in fines or dissolution.

title: Liquidation Procedures
description: Rules for winding up and dissolving companies.
key_articles_rules: Article 70: Liquidator must notify creditors.
Article 75: Assets distributed according to law.

title: Marriage Law
description: Rules governing legal marriage, registration, consent, and minimum age.
key_articles_rules: Article 8: Minimum age: men 18, women 16 (court exceptions possible).
Article 15: Consent required from both parties.
notes_exceptions: Religious courts may impose additional requirements.

title: Divorce Law
description: Conditions, custody, alimony, and judicial procedures.
key_articles_rules: Article 30: Grounds include incompatibility, abuse, neglect.
Article 35: Custody prioritizes child welfare.
notes_exceptions: Alimony depends on spouse’s income and living standard.

title: Child Custody
description: Rules for guardianship and parental responsibility.
key_articles_rules: Article 40: Custody awarded based on best interest of child.
Article 42: Parents maintain right to visitation.

title: Inheritance Law
description: Distribution of estate after death according to law.
key_articles_rules: Article 50: Fixed shares for spouses, children, parents.
Article 55: Testamentary freedom limited by legal shares.

title: Adoption Law
description: Legal process for adopting minors.
examples_use_cases: Adopting a child from a legal orphanage.
Rights and obligations of adoptive parents.
key_articles_rules: Article 60: Adoption requires court approval.
Article 65: Adopted children have inheritance rights.

title: Domestic Violence Protection
description: Legal measures to protect family members from abuse.
key_articles_rules: Article 70: Courts can issue restraining orders.
Article 72: Abusers may face imprisonment.

title: Guardianship Law
description: Legal guardianship for minors and incapacitated adults.
key_articles_rules: Article 75: Guardian must act in the best interest of the ward.

title: Legal Terms and Definitions
description: Definitions of commonly used legal terms.
key_articles_rules: Provides reference to match queries to correct law domain.

title: Common Legal Abbreviations
description: Commonly used abbreviations in legal documents.

title: Judicial and Court Terms
description: Terms related to courts, judges, and legal proceedings.

title: Litigation Processes
description: Steps and procedures in civil and criminal lawsuits.

title: Arbitration and Mediation
description: Alternative dispute resolution methods.

title: Legal Roles
description: Definitions of parties in legal cases.

title: Legal References for RAG Matching
description: Keywords, topics, and articles for RAG-based retrieval.
examples_use_cases: Matching queries like divorce procedure to Family-Law.
Corporate tax rate mapped to Tax-Law.

title: Employment Contracts
description: Legal requirements for contracts between employers and employees.
key_articles_rules: Article 12: Contracts must be written.
Article 20: Termination requires notice or compensation.

title: Workers’ Rights
description: Rights regarding wages, benefits, and working conditions.
key_articles_rules: Article 25: Annual leave and sick leave guaranteed.
Article 30: Safe working environment required.

title: Health and Safety Regulations
description: Occupational safety and standards.
key_articles_rules: Article 35: Employers must provide protective equipment.
Article 40: Non-compliance penalties apply.

title: Minimum Wage and Benefits
description: Defines minimum wages, bonuses, and benefits.
key_articles_rules: Article 45: Minimum wage set by government decree.
Article 50: Benefits include health insurance.

title: Collective Bargaining
description: Legal process for negotiations between employers and unions.
key_articles_rules: Article 55: Employers must recognize registered unions.
Article 60: Collective agreements are legally binding.

title: Termination and Severance
description: Rules on dismissal, redundancy, and compensation.
key_articles_rules: Article 65: Termination notice required.
Article 70: Severance calculated based on tenure.

title: Labor Dispute Resolution
description: Mechanisms for resolving conflicts between employer and employee.
examples_use_cases: Filing a complaint at labor office.
key_articles_rules: Article 75: Labor disputes referred to Labor Office first.
Article 80: Court intervention if unresolved.
